name: AZQ Stage 3 Wave C Checks
purpose: Define task-specific automated checks for Stage 3 Wave C so the Codex runner can evaluate Agenda closeout work, including regression coverage and documentation alignment, without hardcoding Stage 3 logic into the runner.

baseline_checks.name: compileall
baseline_checks.description: Verify the azq package still compiles after the patch.

baseline_checks.name: agenda_storage_import
baseline_checks.description: Verify the Agenda storage facade still imports cleanly.

STAGE3-WAVEC-01.description: Add Stage 3 regression test suite for canonical Agenda storage and CLI flows.

checks.name: stage3_test_file_exists
checks.description: Verify the Stage 3 regression test file exists.

checks.name: stage3_regression_suite_discovery_run
checks.description: Verify the repository's standard unittest discovery command runs successfully with the Stage 3 regression suite present.

checks.name: stage3_test_file_covers_agenda_storage_and_cli_flows
checks.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('tests/test_stage3_wave_c.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
for snippet in [
    'normalize_task_record',
    'parse_task_record',
    'next_task_id',
    'validate_parent_deliverable',
    'parse_dag_record',
    'agenda build',
    'agenda list',
    'agenda show',
    'agenda dag'
]:
    assert snippet in text, snippet
for stale in [
    'task start',
    'task complete',
    'azq task list',
    'azq dag build',
    'azq dag show'
]:
    assert stale not in text, stale
PY
checks.description: Verify the Stage 3 regression suite covers canonical Agenda storage and the live azq agenda command family without requiring non-live task lifecycle commands.

human_checks: The new regression suite actually exercises canonical task markdown records, canonical DAG artifacts, deliverable-parent validation, and the live azq agenda build, list, show, and dag flow.
The tests stay centered on the current Stage 3 command surface rather than reopening task lifecycle mutation behavior that the live code does not expose.

STAGE3-WAVEC-02.description: Align Stage 3 documentation with the live Agenda baseline.

checks.name: readme_teaches_live_agenda_storage_and_commands
checks.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
for snippet in [
    'data/agenda/tasks/',
    'data/agenda/dags/',
    'data/agenda/logs/',
    'azq agenda build <deliverable_id>',
    'azq agenda list',
    'azq agenda show <task_id>',
    'azq agenda dag <deliverable_id>'
]:
    assert snippet in text, snippet
PY
checks.description: Verify README.md teaches the live canonical Agenda storage model and command family.

checks.name: bootstrap_teaches_live_agenda_storage
checks.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('AZQ_BOOTSTRAP.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
for snippet in [
    'data/agenda/tasks/',
    'data/agenda/dags/',
    'data/agenda/logs/'
]:
    assert snippet in text, snippet
PY
checks.description: Verify AZQ_BOOTSTRAP.md names the canonical Agenda artifact directories.

checks.name: stage3_docs_no_longer_describe_pre_agenda_gaps_or_stale_surface
checks.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
stage3_text = Path('AZQ_BUILD_TASKS_STAGE_3.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
plan_text = Path('AZQ_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
for stale in [
    'no `azq/agenda/` package exists in the live repository',
    'no `data/agenda/tasks/` directory exists',
    'no `data/agenda/dags/` directory exists',
    'no `data/agenda/logs/` directory exists',
    'the CLI exposes no `azq task ...` or `azq dag ...` commands yet'
]:
    assert stale not in stage3_text, stale
for stale in [
    '`formam`, `agenda`, and `domum` are specified in documents but not yet implemented in code',
    '`azq task list`',
    '`azq task start <task_id>`',
    '`azq task complete <task_id>`',
    '`azq dag build <goal_id>`',
    '`azq dag show <goal_id>`'
]:
    assert stale not in plan_text, stale
PY
checks.description: Verify the Stage 3 build document and implementation plan no longer describe the pre-Agenda gaps or advertise the outdated Stage 3 command surface as current live behavior.

human_checks: The docs teach the live Agenda baseline clearly instead of sounding like a future-only design note.
The rewritten documentation still uses the repository's craft vocabulary and does not read like a generated release note.
If any older `azq task` or `azq dag` wording remains for historical context, it is clearly constrained rather than presented as the live command surface.
